fileContext.overview: This file contains unit tests for the indexer functionality, which is responsible for building a semantic index of code files. The tests cover various aspects of the indexer, including building the index structure, counting symbols, handling symbol collisions, and populating the keyword index.

symbols.name: buildIndex
symbols.purpose: Builds a semantic index of code files
symbols.behavior: Takes a list of file contexts and a dependency graph as input and returns a semantic index
symbols.limitations: Requires a valid dependency graph and file contexts

symbols.name: extractMeaningfulWords
symbols.purpose: Extracts meaningful words from a given text
symbols.behavior: Takes a string as input and returns a list of meaningful words
symbols.limitations: May not work correctly with non-English text or text with special characters
